prestazioni: Engine: N63B44O2 (6.6L V12 twin-turbo) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos (1.35 A/R, 76mm inducer) paired with **Precision Turbo & Engine 6266** wastegates for 12 psi peak boost, retaining OEM variable vane geometry for spool efficiency. Custom **VF Engineering** intercooler core (1200cfm flow) with **Mishimoto** silicone hoses and **Radium Engineering** catch cans to mitigate N63’s notorious oil consumption under high boost.

Fuel System: **AEM 400LPH** in-tank fuel pump with **ID1700x** injectors (side-feed, 1700cc/min) and **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management (replacing the OEM Bosch MED17.7.3) for full flex-fuel E85 compatibility. **Fuelab** adjustable FPR (0-100 psi) and **Radium Engineering** dual-port fuel rail to support 800+ whp on E85 with **NGK 97506** iridium spark plugs (gapped at 0.022").

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP90** transmission reinforcement with **Sonax** full synthetic 8HP-specific fluid (Part #30530001) and **FTX Racing** billet torque converter (3800 RPM stall, 2.8:1 ratio) for aggressive launch control. **Quaife ATB LSD** (85% lockup) in the rear differential with **Drexler Motorsport** 3.73:1 final drive gears (replacing OEM 3.31:1) for improved acceleration. **AP Racing** 6-piston front (400mm) and 4-piston rear (380mm) brake calipers with **PFC** 2-piece rotors (grooved, zinc-coated) and **Ferodo DS2500** pads for fade resistance.
estetica: Aero: **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber front splitter (Ghost-specific, 3-piece) with **Rocket Bunny** GT-style overfenders (widebody conversion, 50mm wider front/60mm rear) and **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (OEM-style louvered vents). **Novitec** rear diffuser (dual-layer, 3D-molded) with **Akrapović** titanium exhaust tips (110mm diameter, quad-outlet). **Vossen** CVT-R forged wheels (22x10.5 ET30 front, 22x12.5 ET35 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (285/30R22 front, 325/25R22 rear).

Lighting: **Lux H8 V4** LED headlight retrofit (OEM+ housing, 5500K CRI90) with **Morimoto XB35** projectors and **GTR Lighting** HID ballasts. **Diode Dynamics** sequential LED turn signals (smoked lenses) and **Oracle Lighting** RGBW underglow kit (chassis-mounted, 1200 lumens per corner) with **Alpharex** controller for dynamic patterns.

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position** carbon-Kevlar bucket seats (OEM mounting points, 6-point Schroth harnesses) with **Sparco** 6-point roll cage (TIG-welded, bolt-in). **Momo** Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, Alcantara) with **AiM MXS Strada** digital dash (OLED, 10Hz GPS). **Bowers & Wilkins** Diamond Series speaker upgrade (18-channel DSP, 2400W RMS) with **JL Audio** 12TW3 subwoofers (custom enclosure, trunk-mounted). **VaisTech** carbon fiber trim (door cards, center console) with **Alcantara** headliner and **Nappa leather** contrast stitching (Black/Red).
